MessageString:
**[NeonBlue]According to all known laws of aviation,[/NeonBlue] there is no way a bee should be able to fly.  
Its wings are too small to get its fat little body off the ground.  
The bee, of course, flies anyway because bees don't care what humans think is impossible.**

[Yellow]Yellow, black. Yellow, black. Yellow, black. Yellow, black.[/Yellow]  
[Magenta]Ooh, black and yellow![/Magenta]  
*Let's shake it up a little.*  

**[NeonGreen]Barry! Breakfast is ready![/NeonGreen]**  
*Coming!*  
__Hang on a second.__  
Hello?  
**Barry?  
Adam?**  
*Can you believe this is happening?*  
I can't.  
*I'll pick you up.*  
Looking sharp.  
*Use the stairs, Your father paid good money for those.*  

[PastelBlue]Sorry. I'm excited.[/PastelBlue]  
Here's the graduate.  
**We're very proud of you, son.**  
A perfect report card, all B's.  
Very proud.  
__Ma! I got a thing going here.__  
You got lint on your fuzz.  
--Ow! That's me!--  
Wave to us! We'll be in row 118,000.  
**Bye!**

*[NeonOrange]Barry, I told you, stop flying in the house![/NeonOrange]*  
Hey, Adam.  
Hey, Barry.  
_Is that fuzz gel?_  
A little. Special day, graduation.  
Never thought I'd make it.  
Three days grade school, three days high school.  
Those were awkward.  
Three days college. I'm glad I took a day and hitchhiked around The Hive.  
You did come back different.  
Hi, Barry. Artie, growing a mustache? Looks good.  
_Hear about Frankie?_  
Yeah.  
_You going to the funeral?_  
No, I'm not going.  

**...**

[NeonPink]*(And so on, with each dialogue and narration formatted using bold, italic, underline, and color tags as needed.)*[/NeonPink]
